name: Chartlog
description_short: Visual-first trading journal that auto-captures chart screenshots and overlays trade data for pattern recognition.
description_long:
Chartlog takes a visual-first approach to trade journaling, automatically capturing chart screenshots at the time of your trades and overlaying entry/exit points, P&L, and other metrics directly on the charts. This makes it exceptionally easy to review your trades visually and spot patterns in your setups.

The platform supports auto-import from most brokers and generates detailed analytics reports on your trading performance. Chartlog's strength is in making the review process fast and visual rather than forcing traders to wade through spreadsheets and data tables.

With three tiers from Lite ($14.99/mo) to Pro ($39.99/mo), Chartlog scales with your needs. The Lite plan covers basic journaling for casual traders, while Pro unlocks advanced analytics and unlimited chart storage for active day traders.
pros: Auto chart screenshots make visual review effortless
Trade data overlaid directly on charts
Good value at the Lite tier
cons: Fewer analytical features than top competitors
meta_description: Visual-first trading journal that auto-captures chart screenshots and overlays trade data for pattern recognition.
